summary: Iteration 25: Comprehensive testing of new SEO Engine improvements. Backend: 34/34 tests passed (100%). Frontend: SEO Infra dashboard fully functional with health score, coverage breakdown, and infrastructure status.

passed_tests: GET /api/seo-engine/sitemap.xml - Returns valid XML with application/xml content-type
Sitemap has urlset with news, xhtml namespaces for Google News and hreflang
Sitemap contains <news:news> tags with <news:publication>, <news:name>, <news:publication_date>, <news:title>, <news:keywords>
Sitemap contains hreflang='en' and hreflang='x-default' tags
GET /api/seo-engine/robots.txt - Returns plain text
robots.txt contains Googlebot-News section with Allow rules
robots.txt has multiple Sitemap directives (sitemap.xml and rss.xml)
robots.txt has Crawl-delay for Googlebot
GET /api/seo-engine/rss.xml - Returns valid XML with channel structure
RSS feed has <category> tags from seo_keywords for each item
RSS has Atom namespace for self-reference
GET /api/seo-engine/article/{id} - Returns HTML with proper content-type
Article page has NewsArticle JSON-LD schema with headline, datePublished, publisher
Article page has BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema with itemListElement
Article page has WebSite JSON-LD schema with SearchAction
Article page has breadcrumb HTML navigation (class='breadcrumb')
Article page has canonical URL meta tag
Article page has hreflang='en' and hreflang='x-default' link tags
Article page has related stories section for internal linking
Article page returns 404 for nonexistent article ID
GET /api/seo-engine/related/{id} - Returns JSON with articles array
Related articles are in same category
Related API respects limit parameter
Related API excludes current article from results
Related API returns empty array for nonexistent article
GET /api/seo-engine/stats - Returns JSON with health_score (0-100)
Stats has image_coverage_percent and with_images count
Stats has telugu_coverage_percent and with_telugu count
Stats has link_coverage_percent and with_links count
Stats has recent_24h and recent_with_seo counts
Stats has seo_coverage_percent with with_seo_meta/without_seo_meta/total_articles
Stats includes sitemap_url, rss_url, robots_url
Frontend index.html has WebSite JSON-LD schema with SearchAction
Frontend index.html has NewsMediaOrganization JSON-LD schema
Frontend index.html has DNS prefetch and preconnect hints for imagekit.io

sitemap_xml.hreflang_support: xhtml:link with hreflang='en', hreflang='te' (for bilingual), hreflang='x-default'

robots_txt.googlebot_news: Dedicated User-agent: Googlebot-News with Allow rules
robots_txt.multiple_sitemaps: Sitemap: sitemap.xml and Sitemap: rss.xml directives

rss_feed.keyword_categories: Multiple <category> tags per item from seo_keywords

server_rendered_article.related_articles: Related Stories section with 4 articles from same category

related_api.filtering: Same category, excludes current article, sorted by published_at
related_api.keyword_matching: Scores by keyword overlap when seo_keywords available

seo_stats.health_score: Composite score 0-100 based on coverage metrics

frontend_seo.website_schema: WebSite JSON-LD with SearchAction for Google Sitelinks
frontend_seo.organization_schema: NewsMediaOrganization JSON-LD with logo, masthead, publishingPrinciples
frontend_seo.performance_hints: dns-prefetch and preconnect for ik.imagekit.io and images.pexels.com

critical_code_review_comments: seo_engine.py: Well-structured with comprehensive Google News sitemap, robots.txt with Googlebot-News rules, RSS with keywords
AgentsDashboard.jsx: SEO Infra tab shows coverage breakdown with visual progress bars, health score ring, and infrastructure status
ArticleModal.jsx: Good Helmet implementation with canonical URL, hreflang tags, OG and Twitter meta tags
index.html: WebSite and NewsMediaOrganization schemas present for Google rich results
Note: %PUBLIC_URL% resolves to empty string in dev mode - will have full URL in production build
seed_data_creation: Used existing article ID e1f9b89e-ca7f-4f88-88c5-d8da1d168ad4 for testing server-rendered article page and related articles API
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Engine v2 fully tested. All 6 SEO endpoints working: /sitemap.xml (Google News + hreflang), /robots.txt (Googlebot-News rules), /rss.xml (keyword categories), /article/{id} (BreadcrumbList + WebSite JSON-LD), /related/{id} (internal linking), /stats (comprehensive health dashboard). Frontend SEO Infra tab at Agents Dashboard (/agents) > Social Media Expert > SEO Infra shows coverage breakdown with progress bars. index.html has WebSite and NewsMediaOrganization JSON-LD schemas. Admin login with 9876543210/123456 and OTP input via data-testid='otp-input'.

design_notes.seo_infra_tab_ui: Clean dashboard with health score ring, NEW TODAY/WITH SEO stats, coverage breakdown with colored progress bars
design_notes.progress_bars: SEO Meta (green), Images (blue), Telugu Translation (purple), Source Links (amber)
design_notes.active_infrastructure: List with green status dots showing Sitemap.xml, RSS Feed, robots.txt, IndexNow, JSON-LD Schema, etc.
